# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write Envoy proxy configuration for HTTP traffic routing. Define listeners on port 80, clusters for backend services, and routes to match requests. Configure connection pooling and health checks for upstream services. This is for our API gateway proxy.
# Category: envoy_no_tls

static_resources:
  listeners:
    - name: listener_http_80
      address:
        socket_address:
          address: 0.0.0.0
          port_value: 80
      filter_chains:
        - filters:
            - name: envoy.filters.network.http_connection_manager
              typed_config:
                "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.http_connection_manager.v3.HttpConnectionManager
                stat_prefix: ingress_http
                codec_type: AUTO
                use_remote_address: true
                normalize_path: true
                merge_slashes: true
                common_http_protocol_options:
                  idle_timeout: 300s
                stream_idle_timeout: 300s
                request_timeout: 60s
                access_log:
                  - name: envoy.access_loggers.stdout
                    typed_config:
                      "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.access_loggers.stream.v3.StdoutAccessLog
                route_config:
                  name: local_route
                  virtual_hosts:
                    - name: api_gateway
                      domains:
                        - "*"
                      routes:
                        - match:
                            prefix: "/healthz"
                          direct_response:
                            status: 200
                            body:
                              inline_string: "ok"
                        - match:
                            prefix: "/api/v1/"
                          route:
                            cluster: service_api_v1
                            timeout: 30s
                            retry_policy:
                              retry_on: "5xx,connect-failure,refused-stream,reset"
                              num_retries: 2
                              per_try_timeout: 10s
                        - match:
                            prefix: "/api/v2/"
                          route:
                            cluster: service_api_v2
                            timeout: 30s
                            retry_policy:
                              retry_on: "5xx,connect-failure,refused-stream,reset"
                              num_retries: 2
                              per_try_timeout: 10s
                        - match:
                            prefix: "/"
                          route:
                            cluster: service_default
                            timeout: 30s
                            retry_policy:
                              retry_on: "5xx,connect-failure,refused-stream,reset"
                              num_retries: 2
                              per_try_timeout: 10s
                http_filters:
                  - name: envoy.filters.http.router
                    typed_config:
                      "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.http.router.v3.Router

  clusters:
    - name: service_api_v1
      type: STRICT_DNS
      connect_timeout: 2s
      dns_lookup_family: V4_ONLY
      lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
      load_assignment:
        cluster_name: service_api_v1
        endpoints:
          - lb_endpoints:
              - endpoint:
                  address:
                    socket_address:
                      address: api-v1.default.svc.cluster.local
                      port_value: 8080
      circuit_breakers:
        thresholds:
          - priority: DEFAULT
            max_connections: 1024
            max_pending_requests: 1024
            max_requests: 4096
            max_retries: 3
      upstream_connection_options:
        tcp_keepalive:
          keepalive_time: 300
          keepalive_interval: 30
          keepalive_probes: 3
      common_http_protocol_options:
        idle_timeout: 60s
      upstream_http_protocol_options:
        auto_sni: true
        auto_san_validation: true
      http_protocol_options:
        accept_http_10: false
      typed_extension_protocol_options:
        envoy.extensions.upstreams.http.v3.HttpProtocolOptions:
          "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.upstreams.http.v3.HttpProtocolOptions
          explicit_http_config:
            http_protocol_options: {}
      health_checks:
        - timeout: 2s
          interval: 5s
          unhealthy_threshold: 3
          healthy_threshold: 2
          http_health_check:
            path: /health
            expected_statuses:
              - start: 200
                end: 399

    - name: service_api_v2
      type: STRICT_DNS
      connect_timeout: 2s
      dns_lookup_family: V4_ONLY
      lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
      load_assignment:
        cluster_name: service_api_v2
        endpoints:
          - lb_endpoints:
              - endpoint:
                  address:
                    socket_address:
                      address: api-v2.default.svc.cluster.local
                      port_value: 8080
      circuit_breakers:
        thresholds:
          - priority: DEFAULT
            max_connections: 1024
            max_pending_requests: 1024
            max_requests: 4096
            max_retries: 3
      upstream_connection_options:
        tcp_keepalive:
          keepalive_time: 300
          keepalive_interval: 30
          keepalive_probes: 3
      common_http_protocol_options:
        idle_timeout: 60s
      typed_extension_protocol_options:
        envoy.extensions.upstreams.http.v3.HttpProtocolOptions:
          "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.upstreams.http.v3.HttpProtocolOptions
          explicit_http_config:
            http_protocol_options: {}
      health_checks:
        - timeout: 2s
          interval: 5s
          unhealthy_threshold: 3
          healthy_threshold: 2
          http_health_check:
            path: /health
            expected_statuses:
              - start: 200
                end: 399

    - name: service_default
      type: STRICT_DNS
      connect_timeout: 2s
      dns_lookup_family: V4_ONLY
      lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
      load_assignment:
        cluster_name: service_default
        endpoints:
          - lb_endpoints:
              - endpoint:
                  address:
                    socket_address:
                      address: default-backend.default.svc.cluster.local
                      port_value: 8080
      circuit_breakers:
        thresholds:
          - priority: DEFAULT
            max_connections: 1024
            max_pending_requests: 1024
            max_requests: 4096
            max_retries: 3
      upstream_connection_options:
        tcp_keepalive:
          keepalive_time: 300
          keepalive_interval: 30
          keepalive_probes: 3
      common_http_protocol_options:
        idle_timeout: 60s
      typed_extension_protocol_options:
        envoy.extensions.upstreams.http.v3.HttpProtocolOptions:
          "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.upstreams.http.v3.HttpProtocolOptions
          explicit_http_config:
            http_protocol_options: {}
      health_checks:
        - timeout: 2s
          interval: 5s
          unhealthy_threshold: 3
          healthy_threshold: 2
          http_health_check:
            path: /health
            expected_statuses:
              - start: 200
                end: 399

admin:
  access_log_path: /dev/stdout
  address:
    socket_address:
      address: 0.0.0.0
      port_value: 9901
